---
title: "An Ly"
format: html
toc: false
---

<div class="hero">

  <div class="hero-left">
    <h1>👋 Hi, I'm An Ly</h1>
    <p><em>“The world moves fast, but I lead with positivity.”</em></p>

    <p>
      I’m a data-driven business analytics professional with experience in 
      <strong>Python, SQL, and statistical modeling</strong>.
      I specialize in transforming complex data into actionable business insights.
    </p>

    <p>
      I’m passionate about solving real-world problems and driving measurable impact through data.
    </p>

    <br>

    <a href="profile.qmd" class="button btn-primary">📖 See More About Me</a>
  </div>

  <div class="hero-center">
    <img src="anlyprofile.jpg" alt="An Ly" class="hero-img"/>
  </div>

  <div class="hero-right">
    <h1>&lt;Data&gt;</h1>
    <p>
      Skilled in analytics, visualization, and modeling to support strategic decision-making.
    </p>
  </div>

</div>

---

## 💼 Experience

Explore my work in data analytics, business strategy, and real-world problem solving.

[📊 View Experience](experience.qmd){.button .btn-outline-primary}

---

## 📄 CV

View my education, technical skills, and professional experience.

[📄 View CV](cv.qmd){.button .btn-outline-primary}

---

## 📬 Contact

I’m always open to new opportunities, collaborations, and professional connections.

[📬 Contact Me](contact.qmd){.button .btn-outline-secondary}
